0.text: Centrilobular nodular opacities in the right upper lobe

1.text: Centrilobular nodular opacities in the right middle lobe lateral segment

4.text: Centrilobular nodular opacities in the left lower lobe superior segment

7.text: Peribronchial thickening in the right lower lobe

8.text: Peribronchial thickening in the left upper lobe

9.text: Peribronchial thickening in the left lower lobe superior segment

10.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the right lung
